race.comment: Plenty of chances here. Quite a few come through a handicap at Flemington on March 28 and of those, GOLDEN PATH (2) looks a good double-figure chance. He was first up and got a long way back under a big weight, finding the line nicely with the fastest last 600/400m of the race. Last time in he did finish a narrow 3rd to Sir Delius & Buckaroo at G1 level, if he can slot in closer here he'll take some beating. ON DISPLAY (6) has been solid in two runs back, working home fairly behind Treasurethe Moment last time (who did it easily). She should be peaking now and has strong claims. TAKEN (12) and AL DUCA (8) come through the Flemington lead in, which AL DUCA won well with TAKEN in second. Both draw wide and probably look to push on. ASTRAL FLAME (13) was second to Treasurethe Moment last time and draws for every chance, have to include.
